$comment: Registry v1.1.0. Changes require version bump, changelog entry, and migration plan.

registry_changelog.description: Initial ratification. 76 books, LXX psalm numbering, page ranges.
CVC corrections: GEN ch31 55->54; EXO 7 chapters (total 1185->1166). Source: Brenton LXX witness.
CVC correction: LEV 27 chapters (total 713->859). Source: Brenton LXX witness. Previous CVC was unverified plan data.
CVC batch verification against Brenton. Corrected/populated: 1MA, 1SA, 2MA, 2SA, EZK, JDT, JOB, PSA, SIR, TOB.
BAR chapters 6→5: ch6 was LJE (separate book). Removed duplicate.
JOS ch24 CVC 33→36: LXX appendix verses 24:34-36 confirmed present in OSB.
1SA CVC corrections: ch1 28→29, ch17 52→33 (LXX shorter text), ch18 18→19. Source: OSB versification analysis.
Added cvc_overrides schema for intentional LXX/MT versification differences. Override entries for 1SA, EZR, DAN, EST, JOL, MAL.
NT CVC corrections: 1TH [10,19,18,21,18]->[10,20,13,18,28], 3JN [14]->[15]. Source: OSB versification verification.
CVC corrections for LXX versification: 2CH ch35: 27 -> 31; 2CH ch36: 23 -> 31; NAH ch2: 13 -> 14; NUM ch17: 13 -> 28; ROM ch16: 24 -> 27; ZEC ch2: 13 -> 17. Source: OSB staged scripture.

CVC corrections from memo 128 foundational purity audit. Fixed: PHP (95→104), COL (99→95), ROM ch14 (26→23), 1CO ch12 (40→31), MIC ch4 (13→14), 1PE ch5 (14→15), MRK ch11 (33→34). Source: promoted canon files verified against OSB.

CVC alignment with promoted canon for 20 books. LXX versification alignment (EXO, DEU, 2KI, TOB, JDT, JOB, SIR, BAR, EZK, EZR, 2SA, JON, JER, NAH, ZEC). Ratified gap alignment (GEN, JDG, EST, 1MA, 3MA). Source: promoted canon files.
1CH ch16 CVC: 43→42. OSB only numbers through verse 42. Source: OSB PDF verification.
1CH ch12 CVC: 40→41, ch16: confirmed at 42. OSB has 41 verses in ch12. Source: OSB PDF.
2CH ch27 CVC: 9→8. OSB only has 8 verses in ch27 (verified via PDF). Source: OSB PDF.

1CH ch1 CVC: 54→42. OSB/LXX versification ends ch1 at v42 (Kings of Edom + Chiefs). The registry value of 54 was MT-based. Ezra audit finding: duplicate content at 1:43-54 removed. Source: Ezra audit + OSB PDF.
DEU ch30 CVC: 19→20. Brenton LXX confirms 20 verses. Staging has 20 verses; canon mega-line had fused ch29+ch30. Source: Brenton LXX witness + staging verification.
NUM CVC LXX alignment: ch16 50→35 (MT 16:36-50 = LXX 17:1-15), ch29 40→39 (MT 29:40 = LXX 30:1), ch30 16→17 (receives shifted verse). Source: OSB PDF pdftotext verification + memo 91 ratification.

psalm_numbering_note: All Psalm anchors use LXX/OSB numbering (PSA.1 through PSA.151). MT offset table included below.

books.name: Letter of Jeremiah
books.note: CONFIRMED separate book in OSB book list (probe 2026-03-06)

appendices.name: 4 Maccabees
appendices.note: Not in OSB main TOC — appendix only, not counted in 76

appendices.name: Prayer of Manasseh
appendices.note: Appendix to 2 Chronicles — not counted in 76

psalm_lxx_mt_offset_table.note: LXX Psalm number → MT/Hebrew Psalm number mapping for cross-reference notes

cvc_overrides._comment: Per-book per-chapter values verified against OSB. Not overwritten by Brenton --fix-safe.

_chapter_count.reason: OSB has Greek additions ch11-16; Brenton lacks them

page_ranges.$comment: Ground truth from manual PDF analysis 2026-03-06. text = [start, end] inclusive. footnotes = [start, end] inclusive.

misc_read_at.$note: 'this passage is read at' — needs further parsing

misc_hyperlinked.$note: Appended hyperlinked notes — needs further parsing
